title: Keyboard
drDigitalIntro: Next is your keyboard — what you type on. It has somewhere between 80 and 100 buttons, called keys, that let you type numbers, letters, and symbols. Let's try it out: my friend Doggo just sent you a message. Type a reply to say hi!

playgroundTask.instructions: Doggo sent you a message! Click the box at the bottom, type a reply, then press Enter to send it.
playgroundTask.incomingMessage: Woof woof! Hi friend! It's me, Doggo. What's your name?

drDigitalSuccess: Message sent! Doggo is thrilled — and your keyboard skills are already paying off.
drDigitalHint: Click the long box at the bottom that says Type Here, type anything you like, then press the Enter key to send it.
